command: $computerName = $env:COMPUTERNAME; $os = (Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem); $cpu = (Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor); Write-Output "=== System Info ==="; Write-Output "Computer Name: $computerName"; Write-Output "OS: $($os.Caption) $($os.Version)"; Write-Output "OS Build: $($os.BuildNumber)"; Write-Output "CPU: $($cpu.Name)"; Write-Output "CPU Cores: $($cpu.NumberOfCores) cores, $($cpu.NumberOfLogicalProcessors) logical processors"
description: معلومات النظام الأساسية: اسم الجهاز، نظام التشغيل، المعالج
